Save your Seat!

Building AI Agent Evals for High-Stakes Incident Response

WHEN: Thursday, August 6, 2026 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM EDT

AI agents are transforming incident response, but their non-deterministic behavior makes quality hard to measure. Learn how Datadog built an eval platform to assess reasoning, tool use, and outcomes in production for high-stakes agents at scale.
